articles.title: Show HN: Open Chronicle – Local Screen Memory for Claude Code and Codex CLI
articles.snippet:
I built an open source version of OpenAI Chronicle.Some design decisions I made:1. Local first: OCR uses Apple Vision, summarization supports local AI providers via Vercel AI SDK. Nothing leaves your computer.
2. Multiple Provider: exposes MCP so any coding a…
articles.ai_summary: Open Chronicle is an open-source local screen memory tool designed for Claude Code and Codex CLI, emphasizing privacy by keeping data local. This tool supports various AI providers and aims to enhance coding productivity.
articles.why_it_matters: Promotes privacy and productivity in coding environments.

articles.title: SpaceX secures $60 billion acquisition option for AI startup Cursor

articles.title: Why India’s college incubators have little to show for a decade of govt push
articles.snippet: Private and independent universities have capital to deploy, but experts say the issue lies in how it is allocated and whether it is directed towards the right areas.
articles.ai_summary: Despite a decade of government support, India's college incubators struggle to show significant results due to misallocation of resources. Experts suggest a need for better strategy in funding.
articles.why_it_matters: Highlights inefficiencies in educational funding, impacting innovation and entrepreneurship in India.

articles.ai_summary: John Ternus, a veteran at Apple, is set to take over as CEO in September, with Tim Cook transitioning to executive chairman. Ternus is expected to lead Apple into a new era focused on AI.

articles.title: Five new Qwen models for coding agents and efficient reasoning are now available in Amazon SageMaker JumpStart
articles.snippet: Today, AWS announced the availability of Qwen3-Coder-Next, Qwen3-30B-A3B, Qwen3-30B-A3B-Thinking-2507, Qwen3-Coder-30B-A3B-Instruct, and Qwen3.5-4B in Amazon SageMaker JumpStart, expanding the portfolio of foundation models available to AWS customers. These f…
articles.ai_summary: AWS has introduced five new Qwen models for coding agents and reasoning, available through Amazon SageMaker JumpStart. This expansion enhances the capabilities of AWS's foundation models, providing more options for developers.
articles.why_it_matters: Broadens the toolkit for developers, improving coding efficiency and reasoning tasks in AI applications.
